message:
chore(FJ-P2C-002-I): add RaptorQ durability sidecars

2 RaptorQ sidecars for evidence artifacts:
- conformance_report.sidecar.json (14 symbols: 12 source + 2 repair)
- perf_delta.sidecar.json (8 symbols: 7 source + 1 repair)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
